sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to employ a courier, despatch a mounted messenger. denotes to compel one to go a journey, to bear a burden, or to perform any other service
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Of foreign origin (compare [H104]); properly to be a courier, that is, (by implication) to press into public service: - compel (to go).
